source_commit_note: Dispatch should use the merge commit containing the softmax-recip measured-SRAM rebalance generator hook.

requested_items.objective: Recompute the softmax-recip-LUT Llama7B endpoint service frontier with measured tile-local SRAM area and packed shared-SRAM capacity.

expected_result.reason: The result should report best latency, HBM byte share, packed shared-SRAM capacity, and the replaced abstract local capacity.

requested_items.notes: Use the current softmax-recip endpoint schedule plus r4 endpoint/router/SRAM composition evidence so the rebalance closes only the remaining local SRAM capacity abstraction. Merged via PR #903 and merge 24814a267632cb12d380c83350d141f94c2dc16a at 2026-06-17T11:30:31.611323Z.
